title: Synth_xilinx generates too many DSPs for simple multiplication

features.name: sign_extension_via_replication_concatenation
features.description: Code should include sign extension of a value using replication concatenation pattern {N{msb_bit}}, value where N replicates the MSB to extend the bit width

features.name: wide_multiplication_sign_extended_operands
features.description: Code should include multiplication of two sign-extended operands where each operand is wider than 18 bits and the combined result width exceeds single DSP capacity

features.name: result_truncation_via_bit_slice
features.description: Code should include truncation of a multiplication result by selecting a lower bit range, where the original result is significantly wider than the selected portion
